content: Remote OK Outside Sales Representative Omada.ai <p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Compensation:</strong> <strong>$20</strong>/hr + uncapped commission (<strong>$200</strong> per close). Top performers can earn up to $100K</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Employment type:</strong> 1099 Independent Contractor position / Freelance</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Schedule:</strong> Up to 40 hours a week</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Work type: </strong>Remote (this is NOT a work-from-home position). Some field work and some computer time.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Location:</strong> Your local city, must reside in the United States</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>The Opportunity</strong></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">AI is changing everything. Small businesses deserve to benefit.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Right now, the salons, restaurants, gyms, coffee shops, and local shops and services that give every community its character are being left behind. They can't afford big marketing agencies. They don't have time to learn new tools. And most of the technology being built isn't being built for them.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Here's the thing: small business owners aren't sitting around clicking ads looking for solutions. They're heads-down running their businesses. They buy from people they trust â and that's exactly what our Territory Partners become, someone they can trust.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://Omada.ai">Omada.ai</a> is changing the game â and we need people on the ground to help lead the charge. We're hiring <strong>Outside Sales Representatives /</strong> <strong>Territory Partners</strong> who are hungry, people-first, and genuinely excited about AI and what it can do for small businesses. In return, we'll put you on the front lines of one of the most important technology shifts of our lifetime, teach you everything you need to know, and pay you very well to do it.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This is your chance to be part of the AI revolution â not by staring at a screen, but by walking into your community and making a real difference for real people.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>What youâll do</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">You'll be the face of Omada in your area â connect with local businesses, starting conversations, and showing owners how our AI platform can handle their marketing while they focus on running their business.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">You probably already know places like these. You eat at them, get your hair cut at them, and work out at them. Every one of them is trying to grow, and every one of them is struggling to keep up with technology â and you're showing up with a solution built specifically for them.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Your week looks like this:</strong></p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Identify 10â50 businesses in your area using Omada's Route Planner</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Start the conversation in person or on the telephone, and ask a few clarifying questions</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Show a few examples of Omada right there on your phone or tablet</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Offer a free trial â no risk for them. Your trials are your leads</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Use our CRM HubSpot to track, follow up, follow up, follow up, and close</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">When they convert to a paid subscription, you earn $200</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Most of our Territory Partners close their first trial within the first week, and 3+ per week after that.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>Where this can take you</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">We're building something big â and we promote from within. Top Territory Partners can move into team lead, city manager, and regional roles as we grow. If you want to build a real career at the intersection of AI and sales, this is where it starts.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hungry, self-motivated, and comfortable walking into a room</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Genuinely excited about AI and what it can do for small businesses</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong communicator who connects with people quickly</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">No prior sales experience required â we'll teach you everything</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Must reside in the United States</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Must be 18 years of age or older</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Bonus: sales experience; experience working with small business owners</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>This role is well-suited for</strong></h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hunter sales reps who can develop their own book of business and want to earn uncapped commissions and a short sale cycle</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">College grads or students who want to build sales skills and make real money</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Anyone tired of pure commission work but still wants serious upside</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>About </strong><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://Omada.ai"><strong>Omada.ai</strong></a></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">Omada is on a mission to help Main Street and local high streets win. We're building the largest organic growth platform for small businesses â a fully managed, AI-powered marketing team that grows SMBs end-to-end, without spending a dollar on paid ads. Founded by experienced operators and backed by world-class investors, including HubSpot, we're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in the country â and we're just getting started.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></
